quote: If you pray for rain, be prepared to deal with some mud. – Mary Engelbreit
fact: By raising your legs slowly and lying on your back, you cannot sink into quicksand.
tip: Use keyboard shortcuts to save time.
joke: It was raining cats and dogs the other day. I almost stepped in a poodle.
